verses.text: Tua ciangin a tapa Jehoshafat in ama tangin uk a, Israel langpangin amahmah kithakhauhsak hi
Amah in Judah khuapi kulhneite khempeuhah galkapte koih a, Judah gamsung leh a pa Asa in a laksa Efraim khuapite sungah khuacingte a koih hi
Amah in a pa' gamtat masate zui ahih manin Jehoshafat tawh Topa om hi. Amah in Baal-te bialo hi
Israel-te' gamtat bang hiloin ama pa' Pasian zongin ama thupiakna a zui hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in ama khutsungah kumpi gam kipsak a, Judah mi khempeuh in Jehoshafat tungah siah puak uh hi. Amah hau mahmah a, minthang mahmah hi
Topa' na a sepna-ah hang mahmah a, Judah gamsung panin mual dawna biakpiaknate leh Asherah milimte a lakhia hi
Ama uk a kum thumna kumin ama uliante Benhail, Obadiah, Zekhariah, Nethanel, leh Mikaiah, Judah khuapite--ah thuhilh dingin a sawl hi

Amaute tawh Levi mi Shemaiah, Nethaniah, Zebadiah, Asahel, Shemiramoth, Jehonathan, Adonijah, Tobijah, leh Tobadonijah a paikhawm sak hi. Tua ciangin Levi mite tawh siampi Elishama leh Jehoram zong a paisak hi
Amaute in Topa' thukham laibu kengin Judah gamsungah hilh uh hi. Judah khuapi khempeuhah amaute pai kawikawi-in mite lakah a hilh uh hi
Tua ciangin Judah gam kimkotah a om kumpi gam khempeuh tungah Topa kihtakna om a, amaute in Jehoshafat do ngam nawnlo uh hi

Filistia mite pawlkhat in Jehoshafat tungah letsongte, leh siah dingin ngun a puak uh hi. Tua ciangin Arab-te in zong ama tungah tuutal tul sagih leh za sagih, leh keeltal tul sagih leh za sagih mah a puak uh hi
Tua ciangin Jehoshafat hong lianzaw semsem hi. Amah in Judah gam sungah munmuan'huaite leh vankoihna khuapite lam a
amah in Judah khuapite sungah van tampi a nei hi. Amah in a thahat a hang galkapte Jerusalem-ah a nei hi
A beh ciat uh tawh kizui-in amaute a phazah hih bang ahi hi. Judah sung pan a tulin a ukte: Adnah a ukpa hi a, a thahat a galhang mi tul za thum tawh ahi hi
Ama zomah a ukpa Jehohanan hi a, mi tul za nih leh tul sawmgiat tawh ahi hi
Ama zomah Topa' nasepna dingin a kipia Zikri' tapa Amasiah hi a, a thahat a galhang mi tul za nih tawh ahi hi
Benjamin sung panin: A thahat a galhang Eliada hi a, thal leh lum a tawi mi tul za nih tawh ahi hi
Tua ciangin ama zomah Jehozabad hi a, galdo dingin hiam a tawi mi tul za khat leh tul sawmgiat tawh ahi hi
Hihte pen kumpipa in Judah gamsung khempeuhah kulh a nei khuapite-ah a koihte banah kumpipa' na a semte ahi hi.
